prompt.goal: Entity JobApplication map table Applications; unique (JobPostingId, TutorId); Status Pending default; migration.
prompt.scope: - Fields: JobPostingId, TutorId, CoverNote, ProposedRate, Status, AppliedAt, UpdatedAt - ToTable("Applications") - Unique index JobPostingId+TutorId - FK Job Cascade, Tutor Restrict
prompt.hardRules: - KHÔNG Controller Apply UI - KHÔNG Notification (M11) bắt buộc ở T1
prompt.testPlan: 1. dotnet build 2. Migration có unique index
